ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the city is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., 25-34, 35-44) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level (e.g., Bachelor, Master or doctorate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Active status of the user (true for active, false for inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the survey data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health metric */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the health metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the health metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the health metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the survey question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of the survey question (e.g., multiple choice, open-ended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the question was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the question was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey response */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey question */,
  "response_value" TEXT /* Value of the response */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES survey_questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_surveys, edit_surveys) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
